subject: Properties of Expectation
question: The stock prices of two companies at the end of any given year are modeled with random variables $X$ and $Y$ that follow a distribution with joint density function $$f_{XY}(x,y) = \begin{cases} 2x & 0<x<1,\ x<y<x+1 \\ 0 & \text{otherwise.} \end{cases}$$ What is the conditional variance of $Y$ given that $X = x$?
